prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约3487→3663→3789→4075→4098名，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近5年累计后移约611名，近3年加速后移约309名；2025年基准位次约4098名；该校在甘肃理科（物理类）招生计划2021年75人、2022年74人、2023年73人、2024年83人、2025年87人，呈小幅递增；2026年计划大幅增至126人，较2025年扩招约44.8%，显著增加录取名额，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第31名，近年排名稳定在第29–32名区间，属于全国顶尖高校行列；抖音综合热度排名第16位（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续升温；声誉评价未见明显负面舆情，近年无投档断档记录，整体报考心理稳定偏积极；第五轮学科评估中化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，共8个A-/A/A级学科，工科与管理学科实力均衡，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校强势工科高度匹配；甘肃省2026年普通高考考生总数218700人，较2025年（物理类121443+历史类58374=179817）增长约21.6%，按近年物理类占比约66.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约145436人，较2025年增加约23993人（+19.7%），竞争基数明显扩大；湖南大学位于长沙市，属华中地区，对甘肃考生无显著地域偏好或排斥；该校在甘肃招生占比约1.2%（2025年），属正常跨省招生比例，无特殊倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4098名、2026年大幅扩招44.8%使位次数字增大（更易进）、但甘肃物理类考生增加约19.7%使竞争加剧、学校层次高且专业热度持续偏热等多重因素，扩招效应略大于考生增量效应，但声誉热度与专业吸引力部分抵消扩招红利；经综合权衡，预测2026年理科最低位次约5150名，区间4650–5650名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3487 → 3663 → 3789 → 4075 → 4098, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 611 positions in the past 5 years and an accelerated backward shift of about 309 positions in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4098; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu science (physics category) was 75 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 87 in 2025, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 126, an expansion of about 44.8% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 31st in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained rising attention from candidates; no significant negative public opinion in reputation evaluation, no record of admission gaps in recent years, overall stable and slightly positive application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, totaling 8 A-/A/A-level disciplines, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attractive to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the university's strong engineering disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu general college entrance examination is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (physics category 121,443 + history category 58,374 = 179,817); estimated based on the recent physics category proportion of about 66.5%, the 2026 physics category candidates are about 145,436, an increase of about 23,993 (+19.7%) compared to 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, in the Central China region, with no significant regional preference or aversion for Gansu candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio, with no special bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 4098, the significant 44.8% expansion in 2026 making rankings larger (easier to enter), but the increase of about 19.7% in Gansu physics category candidates intensifying competition, the high university level and sustained popularity of majors, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, but reputation heat and major attractiveness partially offset the expansion dividend; after comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 5150, with a range of 4650–5650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology (including Software Engineering diversion)
- Artificial Intelligence/Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering/Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Actuarial Science
- Finance
- Economics (Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Big Data Management and Application.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law
- Architecture
- Civil Engineering/Smart Construction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 5150 is at the midpoint of the range. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 4650 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence); candidates with rankings between 4650–5150 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Actuarial Science, Finance, Economics), while also considering less popular directions in Tier 1; candidates with rankings between 5150–5650 should secure Tier 3 majors (Law, Architecture, Civil Engineering) as a safety net, while also attempting Tier 2 majors. The overall strategy is to sprint for Tier 1, stabilize with Tier 2, and secure Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 496, 478, 446, 1173, and 538 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall; in 2024, the ranking dropped to 1173 due to the radio and television directing major, but returned to 538 in 2025; over the past three years (excluding outliers), rankings fluctuated within the 446–538 range, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 538; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu for liberal arts (history category) was 9 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, showing an initial increase followed by a decrease; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 20, a 150% expansion compared to 2025, substantially increasing admission slots and theoretically alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country; ranked 16th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure; no significant negative public opinion in reputation evaluation, no record of enrollment gaps in recent years, stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration received an A rating, Applied Economics an A- rating, etc., which are highly relevant to liberal arts majors (Finance, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.); although Law has not been individually rated, it is a traditional strong liberal arts university outside the Five Institutes and Four Departments.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, with strong advantages for civil service exams; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu general college entrance examination is 218,700, and based on the recent history category proportion of about 33%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is approximately 72,171, an increase of about 13,797 (+23.6%) compared to 58,374 in 2025, significantly expanding the competitive base; Hunan University is located in Changsha, with no significant regional preference for Gansu liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%, a normal cross-province ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 538, the 150% enrollment expansion in 2026 significantly increases the ranking number (easier to enter), but the increase of about 23.6% in Gansu history category candidates intensifies competition, the high university level and hot liberal arts majors, the expansion effect far exceeds the candidate increase effect, but reputation heat and major attractiveness partially offset the expansion dividend; after comprehensive weighing, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts is approximately 992, with a range of 843–1141.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 992 is at the midpoint of the range. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 843 can aim for Tier 1 majors (Law, Finance); candidates with rankings between 843 and 992 should focus on Tier 2 majors (History, Chinese Language and Literature); candidates with rankings between 992 and 1141 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Public Administration, Japanese). The overall strategy is to aim for Tier 1, stabilize with Tier 2, and secure with Tier 3.
